description_long: This is a compact hand axe featuring a robust, slightly curved wooden handle with a natural grain finish. The handle is ergonomically shaped, widening at the base for a secure grip and narrowing toward the head. The axe head is forged from dark metal, with a broad, wedge-shaped blade on one side and a flat poll on the opposite end. The blade edge is straight and sharp, suitable for chopping or splitting wood, while the poll is squared off for hammering tasks. The head is securely mounted onto the handle using a traditional wedged fitting, with no visible screws or modern fasteners. There are no visible brand markings or decorative engravings, giving the axe a utilitarian, classic appearance.
description: A compact hand axe with a curved wooden handle and a dark metal wedge-shaped blade, designed for chopping and splitting tasks. The head is traditionally mounted and the tool has a classic, utilitarian look.
description_view_0: The axe is seen from the top of the handle, showing the narrow width and the alignment of the head with the handle.
description_view_1: The axe is viewed from the side, clearly displaying the curved wooden handle and the full profile of the wedge-shaped metal blade.
description_view_2: The axe is seen from the top of the blade, highlighting the thickness of the head and the straight alignment of the handle.
description_view_3: The opposite side view of the axe, showing the other face of the blade and the handle's ergonomic curve.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with ergonomic grip, natural finish, oval cross-section, and flared base for secure handling.
attribute_blade_design: Single broad wedge-shaped blade with a straight edge and squared poll, no beard, utilitarian design.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged fitting securing the blade to the handle.
